name: cf313x346
drl:
rule TJ0 when $a : E0() $b : E2(this after[0ms,50ms] $a) then end
rule TJ1 salience -4 when $a : E2() $b : E2(this during[50ms,80ms] $a) then end
rule CH2 when $a : E0() $b : E1(this before[0ms,100ms] $a) $c : E2(this after[0ms,100ms] $b) then end
rule W3 when accumulate( E1(tag == "z", $t : ts) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
rule J4 when $e : E1($t : tag) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule RD5 salience 3 when D() then end
rule ND6 salience 5 when not D() P() then end
rule NE7 salience -8 when exists E1() P() then end
